description: A top candidate has received an offer but wants to negotiate for a higher salary.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter receives the candidate's request for a higher salary.

nodes.task_description: Consult with the hiring manager and compensation team to see if there is room to increase the offer.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter discusses the request internally and gets approval for a revised offer.

nodes.task_description: Present the revised, final offer to the candidate.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter communicates the new offer to the candidate.
